requirement_topic.en: FCC Authorization — RF / Wireless Functions (Part 15, Part 18)
requirement_topic.zh: FCC认证——射频/无线功能（第15部分、第18部分）
requirement_topic.zht: FCC認證——射頻/無線功能（第15部分、第18部分）

summary.en: Lithium battery products that incorporate any wireless or radio-frequency function — including Bluetooth (BLE) pairing for app control, NFC, Wi-Fi, or wireless charging receivers (Qi) — are electronic devices subject to FCC authorization under 47 CFR Part 15 before they may be marketed or sold in the United States. The authorization type depends on the technology: intentional radiators (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, NFC) typically require FCC Certification (Grant of Equipment Authorization) via a Telecommunications Certification Body (TCB); unintentional radiators (switching power supplies within chargers, which can emit RF noise) require FCC Declaration of Conformity (DoC) or Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) under Part 15 Subpart B. Wireless (Qi) chargers may also require verification under Part 18 (Industrial, Scientific and Medical equipment) if their operating frequency falls within ISM bands. Pure lithium batteries with no RF-emitting circuitry do not require FCC authorization.
summary.zh: 含有任何无线或射频功能的锂电池产品——包括用于应用控制的蓝牙（BLE）配对、NFC、Wi-Fi或无线充电接收器（Qi）——在美国上市或销售前，须依据47 CFR第15部分获得FCC认证。认证类型取决于技术类型：有意辐射体（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、NFC）通常须通过电信认证机构（TCB）获得FCC认证（设备授权许可）；无意辐射体（充电设备内的开关电源，可能产生射频噪声）须依据第15部分子部分B进行FCC符合性声明（DoC）或供应商符合性声明（SDoC）。若无线（Qi）充电器的工作频率落在ISM频段内，还可能须依据第18部分（工业、科学和医疗设备）进行核查。不含射频发射电路的纯锂电池无需FCC认证。
summary.zht: 含有任何無線或射頻功能的鋰電池產品——包括用於應用控制的藍牙（BLE）配對、NFC、Wi-Fi或無線充電接收器（Qi）——在美國上市或銷售前，須依據47 CFR第15部分獲得FCC認證。認證類型取決於技術類型：有意輻射體（藍牙、Wi-Fi、NFC）通常須通過電信認證機構（TCB）獲得FCC認證（設備授權許可）；無意輻射體（充電設備內的開關電源，可能產生射頻噪聲）須依據第15部分子部分B進行FCC符合性聲明（DoC）或供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）。若無線（Qi）充電器的工作頻率落在ISM頻段內，還可能須依據第18部分（工業、科學和醫療設備）進行核查。不含射頻發射電路的純鋰電池無需FCC認證。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 18 — Industrial, Scientific and Medical Equipment (FCC)
47 CFR Part 2 — Frequency Allocations and Radio Treaty Matters; General Rules and Regulations (FCC equipment authorization procedures)

summary.en: China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval for products with wireless transmission functions under the Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (2016). Products with Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, or NFC embedded in power banks or battery packs must obtain SRRC approval from MIIT before sale in China. Additionally, CMIIT ID (China Mobile and Internet Industry of Things network ID) is required to be marked on the product. SRRC approval is country-specific and does not transfer to the US FCC authorization scheme; separate FCC authorization is required for the US market.
summary.zh: 中国依据《中华人民共和国无线电管理条例》（2016年）要求含有无线传输功能的产品获得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。内置蓝牙、Wi-Fi或NFC的移动电源或电池包在华销售前须获得工信部SRRC认证，且产品须标注CMIIT ID（中国移动互联网物联网标识）。SRRC认证为国家特定认证，不适用于美国FCC认证体系；进入美国市场须单独获得FCC认证。
summary.zht: 中國依據《中華人民共和國無線電管理條例》（2016年）要求含有無線傳輸功能的產品獲得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。內置藍牙、Wi-Fi或NFC的行動電源或電池包在華銷售前須獲得工信部SRRC認證，且產品須標注CMIIT ID（中國移動互聯網物聯網標識）。SRRC認證為國家特定認證，不適用於美國FCC認證體系；進入美國市場須單獨獲得FCC認證。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (2016) — SRRC type approval requirement (MIIT)
CMIIT ID marking requirement for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Products with wireless functions (Bluetooth app control, NFC, Wi-Fi, Qi) require separate FCC authorization for the US market — Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute. The authorization path depends on the technology: Bluetooth/Wi-Fi modules usually use FCC-certified pre-certified modules (which carry their own FCC ID), reducing the host product's authorization burden to a Class II Permissive Change or SDoC — but only if the module is used within its authorized parameters. Products using custom RF designs must obtain a new FCC Certification. A common error: treating a power bank with Bluetooth as requiring only safety listing (UL 2056) without addressing FCC Part 15 — both are required independently. Pure wired power banks with no RF emission above Part 15 thresholds are exempt from FCC certification (but not from DoC/SDoC in some cases).
gap.zh: 含无线功能（蓝牙应用控制、NFC、Wi-Fi、Qi）的产品进入美国市场须单独获得FCC认证——中国SRRC认证不可替代。认证路径取决于技术类型：蓝牙/Wi-Fi模块通常使用已获FCC认证的预认证模块（附带独立FCC ID），可将宿主产品的认证负担降低为II类许可变更或SDoC——但仅限于在授权参数范围内使用该模块的情况。使用自定义射频设计的产品须获得全新FCC认证。常见错误：将带蓝牙的移动电源视为仅需安全认证（UL 2056）而忽略FCC第15部分——两者须独立满足。不含射频发射或射频发射低于第15部分阈值的纯有线移动电源可豁免FCC认证（但在某些情况下仍需DoC/SDoC）。
gap.zht: 含無線功能（藍牙應用控制、NFC、Wi-Fi、Qi）的產品進入美國市場須單獨獲得FCC認證——中國SRRC認證不可替代。認證路徑取決於技術類型：藍牙/Wi-Fi模組通常使用已獲FCC認證的預認證模組（附帶獨立FCC ID），可將宿主產品的認證負擔降低為II類許可變更或SDoC——但僅限於在授權參數範圍內使用該模組的情況。使用自定義射頻設計的產品須獲得全新FCC認證。常見錯誤：將帶藍牙的行動電源視為僅需安全認證（UL 2056）而忽略FCC第15部分——兩者須獨立滿足。不含射頻發射或射頻發射低於第15部分閾值的純有線行動電源可豁免FCC認證（但在某些情況下仍需DoC/SDoC）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for products with intentional RF emissions (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, NFC, Qi) — FCC Certification required under 47 CFR Part 15; SDoC/DoC required for unintentional radiators; pure wired batteries with no RF function are exempt
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for RF-enabled products — SRRC type approval required under MIIT Radio Regulations; pure batteries without wireless functions are exempt from SRRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FCC authorization under 47 CFR Part 15 is mandatory for lithium battery products with any wireless function (Bluetooth, NFC, Wi-Fi, Qi). Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer to the US. Pure wired batteries with no RF emissions above Part 15 limits do not require FCC certification. Products with pre-certified RF modules may use a reduced authorization path (SDoC), but must verify the module is used within its authorized operating conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】含任何无线功能（蓝牙、NFC、Wi-Fi、Qi）的锂电池产品须依据47 CFR第15部分强制获得FCC认证。中国SRRC认证不适用于美国市场。不含超出第15部分限值射频发射的纯有线电池无需FCC认证。使用预认证射频模块的产品可采用简化认证路径（SDoC），但须核实模块在授权工作条件范围内使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】含任何無線功能（藍牙、NFC、Wi-Fi、Qi）的鋰電池產品須依據47 CFR第15部分強制獲得FCC認證。中國SRRC認證不適用於美國市場。不含超出第15部分限值射頻發射的純有線電池無需FCC認證。使用預認證射頻模組的產品可採用簡化認證路徑（SDoC），但須核實模組在授權工作條件範圍內使用。
